description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag you can find than this one from nike. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this also makes for a great everyday bag to school, college and even work.Height: 18"Width: 12.6"Depth: 8.3"Capacity: 30 litresWarranty: 6 months from date of purchaseMade of polyester and nylon, with a nylon and polyester lining for durability and easy cleaningBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bagWater resistant tarpaulin bottomOne main copiously spaced zippered compartment with laptop sleeveOne front zippered compartment with organizer sleevesOne zippered utility pocket on the front with swoosh logo on itBrand name on the side and the word Max Air towards the bottomMesh pockets on the sides to hold a sipper and other essentialsSynthetic haul loop for handling easeWide, adjustable Max Air shoulder straps made of 100% recycled excess materials which deliver lightweight, cushioned shock-absorptionErgonomically padded back for carrying comfort CareHand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not dry clean or machine washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringLine dryDo not iron
